calendar.matters:
MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Oct-30-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Linda N. Reyes, Esq., 510/786-9323, for plaintiff La Salle Apartments Ltd. Partnership and opposing party
No appearance by defendants. Tentative ruling adopted -- DEFENDANTs YVETTE WILLIAMS and Ira Young's MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS -- DENIED, defendants have 5 days to answer. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (JJM/301/DR) Reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR #4780

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Aug-30-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Defendant IRA YOUNG in propria persona and moving party
Linda N. Reyes, Esq. 510/786-9323 for Plaintiff and opposing party
* A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- Defendants YVETTE WILLIAMS and IRA YOUNG's motion to quash service of summons is granted. No timely opposition filed. (JJM/301) Joyce Long, CSR 8620

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-05-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Defendants in propria personae YVETTE WILLIAMS and IRA YOUNG demurring party
(Process server Al Hardy also present in court)

The Court having heard from the parties and their process server sustained the demurrer with 10 days leave to amend. Defendants to prepare order consistent with this Court's ruling. Clerk ordered to file PROOF OF SERVICE. (JJM) Reporter: Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
